revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24644718927|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:大三王子神社]] {{Infobox religious building | name = Daisen Ōji Shrine | native_name = 大三王子神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Daisen Ōji Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.36404|139.245089}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Daisan Ōji Shrine'''|大三王子神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11380552|ltq=Q11380552|qid=Q11380552|1=List of Shikinaisha in Izu Province}} ** Series ordinal: 8 ** P155: {{ill|Azusawakenomikoto Shrine|lt=Azusawakenomikoto Shrine|ja|阿豆佐和気命神社|qid=Q134926700|1=Azusawake-no-Mikoto Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135039640|ltq=Q135039640|qid=Q135039640|1=Monoiminano- Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q860928|ltq=Q860928|qid=Q860928|1=Izu Province}} * {{ill|Kamo District, Shizuoka|lt=Kamo district|ar|مقاطعة كامو (شيزوكا)|ceb|Kamo-gun (distrito sa Hapon, Shizuoka-ken)|en|Kamo District, Shizuoka|fa|ناحیه کامو، شیزوئوکا|fr|District de Kamo (Shizuoka)|id|Distrik Kamo, Shizuoka|it|Distretto di Kamo (Shizuoka)|ja|賀茂郡|ko|가모군 (시즈오카현)|pl|Powiat Kamo (Shizuoka)|ru|Камо (Сидзуока)|uk|Повіт Камо (Сідзуока)|zh|賀茂郡|qid=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.36404|139.245089}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181576 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Q11123280|ltq=Q11123280|qid=Q11123280|1=Senior Fifth Rank}} * {{ill|Q11545372|ltq=Q11545372|qid=Q11545372|1=Senior Sixth Rank}} * {{ill|Q11071125|ltq=Q11071125|qid=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * タケミカカノ- ** P2241: {{ill|Q28091153|ltq=Q28091153|qid=Q28091153|1=refers to different subject}} ** P8327: {{ill|Takemikakano- Shrine|lt=Takemikakano- Shrine|qid=Q135039639|1=Takemikakano- Shrine}} == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Takemikakano- Shrine|lt=Takemikakano- Shrine|qid=Q135039639|1=Takemikakano- Shrine}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '東京都新島村本村', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大三王子神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134930667}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine |Name = Daisanōji Shrine |Image = {{Image needed|cat=Izu Islands, Tokyo}} |Location = {{ill|lt=Tokyo Metropolis|Q1490|qid=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Niijima Village|Q1204534|qid=Q1204534|1=Niijima, Tokyo}} Ōmiyama 1-1 |Coordinates = {{Coord|34|21|51.5|N|139|14|40.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deities = Daisanōji Myōjin, Deisanōji Myōjin |Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} |Founded = Unknown |Main hall = |Alternate names = |Pilgrimage sites = |Annual festival = July 5 |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan|label=Daisanōji
Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|21|51.5|N|139|14|40.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|21|51.5|N|139|14|40.5|E}}}} }} '''Daisanōji Shrine''' (だいさんおうじじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|lt=Niijima Village|Q1204534|qid=Q1204534|1=Niijima, Tokyo}} ({{ill|lt=Niijima|Q1191108|qid=Q1191108|1=Nii-jima}}), {{ill|lt=Tokyo Metropolis|Q1490|qid=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}. It is identified with '''Takemikaka-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (たけみかかのみことじんじゃ), which is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}[https://yaokami.jp/1131349/ Daisanōji Shrine] - Eight Million Kami. === Overview === The date of foundation is unknown, but as it is identified as a Shikinaisha, its origins are thought to date back to before ancient times. In {{ill|lt=2019|Q25274|qid=Q25274|1=2019}} ({{ill|lt=Reiwa|Q62609017|qid=Q62609017|1=Reiwa era}} 1), the shrine buildings were destroyed by the {{ill|lt=Reiwa 1 East Japan Typhoon|Q69841946|qid=Q69841946|lt=typhoon damage|1=Typhoon Hagibis}}, and as of 2024 the site remains vacant land with the structures removed[https://niijima-info.jp/enjoy/attractions/daisansama/ Daisanōji Shrine] - Niijima Village Tourist Information Office. === Enshrined deities === * Daisanōji Myōjin (だいさんおうじみょうじん) — the prince of {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Kami|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}, Takemikaka-no-Mikoto (たけみかかのみこと). * Deisanōji Myōjin (でいさんおうじみょうじん) — his younger brother. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://niijima-info.jp/enjoy/attractions/daisansama/ Daisanōji Shrine] - Niijima Village Tourist Information Office == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Daisen Ōji Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Daisen Ōji Shrine]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Shrines in the Islands of Tokyo Metropolis]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Pages with 50+ untranslated japanese characters]]
